items.title: The Bull Case For Honeywell International (HON) Could Change Following Aerospace Spin-Off Plans And HONA Filing
items.description: Honeywell recently filed a Form 10 registration statement with the SEC for the planned spin-off of Honeywell Aerospace, which aims to become an independent public company called HONA on Nasdaq in the third quarter of 2026, focused on electrification, autonomy and safety across commercial air transport, business aviation and defense markets. The company has also scheduled an Investor Day for June 3, 2026, where management plans to outline how separating the Aerospace business could reshape...

items.title: SWKS to Showcase 6G Power Amplifier: Will its Prospects Get a Boost?
items.description: Skyworks Solutions' 6G demo with MediaTek, the Qorvo deal and a new Q2 outlook could shape what is next for the chipmaker.

items.title: Honeywell Advances Breakup Plan As Aerospace Unit Files To Go Solo
items.description: Honeywell files Form 10 to spin off its Aerospace unit (HONA) by Q3 2026. The new $17.4B entity targets a Nasdaq listing to drive focus.

items.title: Honeywell Announces Filing of Form 10 Registration Statement for Planned Spin-Off of Honeywell Aerospace
items.description: Honeywell (Nasdaq: HON) today announced the filing of its Form 10 registration statement ("Form 10") with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission ("SEC") for the planned spin-off of Honeywell Aerospace, which will trade on the Nasdaq under the ticker "HONA." A copy of the Form 10 is available on the SEC website as well as Honeywell's Investor Relations website.

items.title: Digital Utility Industry Report 2026-2035, Profiles of ABB, Accenture, Capgemini, Cisco, Cognizant, Eaton, GE, Honeywell, IBM, Itron, Microsoft, Oracle, SAP, Schneider Electric, Siemens, Toshiba
items.description: The digital utility market is poised for growth through advancements in AI, IoT, and cloud technologies. Opportunities arise in sectors like smart grids, energy trading, and retail, with rising demand in services and IoT.
